1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/mcm4iob/ioBroker.shrdzm/blob/master/io-package.json).

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3014.issue: [S3014] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3018.issue: [S3018] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3020.issue: [E3020] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3050.issue: [W3050] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for "check-and-lint" job in [run #221](https://github.com/mcm4iob/ioBroker.shrdzm/actions/runs/19814365101).

5516.issue: [W5516] type mismatch for "default" at admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_stdConfig/devices: component "chips" expects array but got string

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_stdConfig/items/bindIp" attribute "label" uses key "lblBindIp" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/mcm4iob/ioBroker.shrdzm/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

6028.issue: [W6028] Changelog entry header(s) do not match required version format "x.y.z": **WORK_IN_PROGRESS**

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#90] "[iobroker-bot] Setup Auto-Merge for Dependabot PRs"](https://github.com/mcm4iob/ioBroker.shrdzm/issues/90)

8911.issue: [S8911] File "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml" was found. Consider migrating to the new standard workflow "automerge-dependabot.yml".

8912.issue: [E8912] Automerge workflow file "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml" uses deprecated action "ahmadnassri/action-dependabot-auto-merge" which no longer works. Please migrate to "iobroker-bot-orga/action-automerge-dependabot@v1".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 3.7.0 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/mcm4iob/ioBroker.shrdzm/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/mcm4iob/ioBroker.shrdzm/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/mcm4iob/ioBroker.shrdzm/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.10.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/mcm4iob/ioBroker.shrdzm/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
